purpose: Define the daily intake pipeline: source collection, raw archival, classification, queue routing, receipt generation, and Command Center update — within non-execution boundaries.

trigger.description: Triggered once per operational day, or on-demand by operator. May run unattended within autopilot boundaries.

stages.name: Source Collection
stages.description: Gather raw inputs from declared source channels. No external API calls — only sources already present in the repo or provided by the operator.
inputs: pending queue entries with status 'draft' or 'queued'
stages.boundary: Read-only collection from local repo and operator-provided files. No external fetch.

stages.name: Raw Archive
stages.description: Persist raw source material into knowledge/raw/ with provenance metadata.
stages.boundary: Append-only writes to knowledge/raw/. No deletion of existing raw files.

stages.name: Classification
stages.description: Classify each raw item by domain (crypto, security, engineering, knowledge), sensitivity, and target queue.
stages.boundary: Classification produces metadata only. No external side effects.

stages.name: Queue Entry Generation
stages.description: Create runtime queue entries for each classified item, routing to the appropriate queue (Knowledge, Research, Engineering, Automation, Model, or Approval).
stages.boundary: Append-only to runtime_queue_v0.json. Items routed to Approval Queue remain in 'waiting_approval' status.

stages.name: Receipt Generation
stages.description: Generate individual receipt files and append to the receipt ledger for each processed item.
stages.boundary: Append-only to receipt ledger and receipts directory.

stages.name: Command Center Update
stages.description: Ensure Command Center snapshot loader reflects new queue entries, receipts, and any new knowledge artifacts.
stages.boundary: Code changes to src/lib/command-center.ts or src/routes/command-center.tsx only if new data sources require import. No external deployment.

stages.name: Build and Lint Validation
stages.description: Run npm run build and targeted eslint to confirm no regressions.
stages.boundary: Local validation only. No deployment or publish.

non_execution_boundaries.description: The daily intake workflow is a classification and archival pipeline. It does NOT execute any external actions.
non_execution_boundaries.approval_queue_items: Items classified as requiring external execution are routed to Approval Queue with status 'waiting_approval' and do NOT proceed until explicit operator approval.

next_steps: Implement adapter connectors for each source channel (future — requires separate policy)
Add scheduled trigger via n8n or Zapier (future — requires Automation Queue approval)
Integrate with retrieval indexes for semantic search over archived sources
